stories.title: LeBron Still Waiting — Heat Slips July 27 "Press Conference" Hint; Rich Paul Says No Rush

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Miami Heat briefly posted a YouTube event called "LeBron James Introductory Press Conference" — set for July 27.

They took it down.

Rich Paul says there's "no rush."

Betting odds say Heat 48%, Cavs 27%, Warriors 14%.

We're watching. 👀

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
LeBron's agent Rich Paul:

"We're not going to be rushed."

Heat. Cavs. Warriors. 76ers.

Commissioner Silver wants an answer before the season. The NBA still hasn't released its schedule.

LeBron is on LeBron's time.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: Heat's Deleted YouTube Event, Rich Paul's "No Rush": LeBron Free Agency Theater Reaches New Heights

stories.title: Bam Adebayo and Tyler Herro Had Reported Altercation in Las Vegas

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Breaking: Bam Adebayo and Tyler Herro reportedly had a physical altercation in Las Vegas.

Bam: Still with the Heat. Herro: Traded to Milwaukee in the Giannis deal.

Two former teammates. One ugly offseason moment.

No statements from either player yet.

#Heat #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Heat traded Herro to get Giannis.

Giannis is in Miami. Herro is in Milwaukee. And now Bam and Herro reportedly threw down in Las Vegas.

This offseason has been SOMETHING.

LeBron's still watching. His future team is already making news.

#Heat #NBA #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: Bam Adebayo and Tyler Herro Reportedly Have Physical Altercation in Las Vegas

stories.title: Conflicting Reports — LeBron to Warriors? Yahoo Sports Says Yes; Odds Say Heat

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Yahoo Sports: LeBron "reportedly expected" to sign with Warriors over the Cavs.

Betting odds: Heat 48%, Cavs 27%, Warriors 14%.

Those two things can't both be right.

That gap IS the story.

#LeBronJames #Warriors #Heat

article.headline: LeBron to Golden State? Yahoo Sports Report Conflicts With Betting Markets Favoring Heat

stories.title: Kawhi Investigation — Silver Says Must End Before Season; Raptors Still Can't Plan

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Kawhi Leonard investigation is now 11 months old.

Adam Silver, again: "It needs to be wrapped up before next season."

The probe has expanded. The Raptors still can't plan. The trade is frozen.

When does this end?

#NBA #Raptors #Clippers

stories.title: How LeBron's Decision Reshapes Four NBA Contenders

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
LeBron to Miami: Giannis + LeBron. All in.
LeBron to Cleveland: Mitchell + Harden + Mobley.
LeBron to Golden State: Curry + LeBron.
LeBron to Philly: Embiid + Brown + Maxey.

Every answer is right. One is his.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: Four Teams, One Decision: What LeBron James' Choice Actually Means for Each Finalist
